channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Correspondents' Dinner Shooting Suspect Faces Attempted Assassination Charge
item.description: Cole Allen, accused of opening fire at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, has been charged with attempting to assassinate President Trump.

item.title: Suspect in Correspondents' Dinner Shooting Charged With Attempted Assassination
item.description: Cole Allen, accused in the Correspondents' dinner shooting, is expected to be arraigned in U.S. District Court on the attempted assassination charge.

item.title: Federal Charge Filed Against Man in Correspondents' Dinner Shooting
Correspondents' Dinner Shooting Suspect Faces Three Federal Counts
item.description: Cole Allen was charged Monday in federal court with three counts, including attempted assassination of the president, in connection with the dinner shooting.
